check_in_message.subject: Congratulations on the Upcoming EP Release!
check_in_message.message:
<Hello Nova,>

Just wanted to send a quick message to congratulate you on your upcoming EP release titled 'Soft Machines'. We've been thrilled by your work and are excited to see how this new collection of tracks unfolds. Looking forward to staying connected and celebrating every step with you. Here's hoping for an incredible journey ahead!

Best,
[Your Name] - Demo Label
